description: OpenAI open-weight model optimized for low latency and general-purpose chat; good balance of speed and quality but less capable than larger siblings on complex reasoning tasks.
Lightweight AWQ int4-quantized 8B Llama model optimized for maximum throughput and minimal latency; trades some accuracy for speed and has a small 8K context window.

DeepSeek-R1 distilled into a 32B dense model via chain-of-thought knowledge transfer; outperforms o1-mini on math, code, and reasoning benchmarks but is slower than non-reasoning models and uses the full context window for its thinking traces.
OpenAI's largest open-weight model designed for production general-purpose and high-reasoning use cases with a 128K context window; higher latency and cost than smaller alternatives.

Google's 300M-parameter embedding model producing 768-dimensional vectors, well-suited for multilingual semantic search, classification, and clustering; small size means fast inference but lower embedding quality than larger models.
